name: io.github.aaronsb/salesforce-cloud
description: MCP server for Salesforce CRM — manage opportunities, accounts, contacts, SOQL queries, and analytics
title: Salesforce Cloud

environmentVariables.name: SF_USERNAME
environmentVariables.description: Salesforce username (if set, uses password flow; otherwise client credentials flow)

environmentVariables.name: SF_PASSWORD
environmentVariables.description: Salesforce password (required with SF_USERNAME for password flow)

environmentVariables.name: SF_LOGIN_URL
environmentVariables.description: Your Salesforce My Domain URL (e.g., https://company.my.salesforce.com)
